verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurgat Deus, et dissipentur inimici ejus ;  et fugiant qui oderunt eum a facie ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָק֣וּם אֱ֭לֹהִים יָפ֣וּצוּ אוֹיְבָ֑יו וְיָנ֥וּסוּ מְ֝שַׂנְאָ֗יו מִפָּנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let God arise, and let his enemies be scattered: and let them that hate him flee from before his face.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi ja veisu, edelläveisaajalle. (H68:2) Nouskaan Jumala, että hänen vihollisensa hajoitettaisiin; ja jotka häntä vihaavat, paetkaat hänen edestänsä.
verses.king_james: Let God arise, let his enemies be scattered: let them also that hate him flee before him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut deficit fumus, deficiant ;  sicut fluit cera a facie ignis, sic pereant peccatores a facie Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּהִנְדֹּ֥ף עָשָׁ֗ן תִּ֫נְדֹּ֥ף כְּהִמֵּ֣ס דּ֭וֹנַג מִפְּנֵי־אֵ֑שׁ יֹאבְד֥וּ רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים מִפְּנֵ֥י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: As smoke vanisheth, so let them vanish away: as wax melteth before the fire, so let the wicked perish at the presence of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Aja heitä pois, niinkuin savu ajetaan pois; niinkuin vedenvaha sulaa tulen edessä, niin hukkukaan jumalattomat Jumalan kasvoin edessä.
verses.king_james: As smoke is driven away, so drive them away: as wax melteth before the fire, so let the wicked perish at the presence of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et justi epulentur, et exsultent in conspectu Dei,  et delectentur in lætitia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽצַדִּיקִ֗ים יִשְׂמְח֣וּ יַ֭עַלְצוּ לִפְנֵ֥י אֱלֹהִ֗ים וְיָשִׂ֥ישׂוּ בְשִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And let the just feast, and rejoice before God: and be delighted with gladness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta vanhurskaat riemuitkaan ja iloitkaan Jumalan edessä, ja riemuitkaan ilossa.
verses.king_james: But let the righteous be glad; let them rejoice before God: yea, let them exceedingly rejoice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate Deo ; psalmum dicite nomini ejus :  iter facite ei qui ascendit super occasum.  Dominus nomen illi ; exsultate in conspectu ejus.  Turbabuntur a facie ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֤ירוּ ׀ לֵאלֹהִים֮ זַמְּר֢וּ שְׁ֫מ֥וֹ סֹ֡לּוּ לָרֹכֵ֣ב בָּ֭עֲרָבוֹת בְּיָ֥הּ שְׁמ֗וֹ וְעִלְז֥וּ לְפָנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing ye to God, sing a psalm to his name, make a way for him who ascendeth upon the west: the Lord is his name. Rejoice ye before him: but the wicked shall be troubled at his presence,
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisatkaan Jumalalle, veisatkaat kiitosta hänen nimellensä; tehkäät hänelle tietä, joka istuu ylimmäisten taivasten päällä; hänen nimensä on Herra, ja iloitkaat hänen edessänsä.
verses.king_james: Sing unto God, sing praises to his name: extol him that rideth upon the heavens by his name Jah, and rejoice before him.

verses.latin_vulgate: patris orphanorum, et judicis viduarum ;  Deus in loco sancto suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲבִ֣י יְ֭תוֹמִים וְדַיַּ֣ן אַלְמָנ֑וֹת אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים בִּמְע֥וֹן קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who is the father of orphans, and the judge of widows. God in his holy place:
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka on orpoin isä ja leskein tuomari: hän on Jumala pyhässä asumisessansa.
verses.king_james: A father of the fatherless, and a judge of the widows, is God in his holy habitation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus qui inhabitare facit unius moris in domo ;  qui educit vinctos in fortitudine,  similiter eos qui exasperant, qui habitant in sepulchris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ מ֘וֹשִׁ֤יב יְחִידִ֨ים ׀ בַּ֗יְתָה מוֹצִ֣יא אֲ֭סִירִים בַּכּוֹשָׁר֑וֹת אַ֥ךְ ס֝וֹרְרִ֗ים שָׁכְנ֥וּ צְחִיחָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: God who maketh men of one manner to dwell in a house: Who bringeth out them that were bound in strength; in like manner them that provoke, that dwell in sepulchres.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala, joka yksinäisten antaa asua huoneessa, ja vie vangit ulos oikeudella; mutta vastahakoiset asuvat kuivassa.
verses.king_james: God setteth the solitary in families: he bringeth out those which are bound with chains: but the rebellious dwell in a dry land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, cum egredereris in conspectu populi tui,  cum pertransires in deserto,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים בְּ֭צֵאתְךָ לִפְנֵ֣י עַמֶּ֑ךָ בְּצַעְדְּךָ֖ בִישִׁימ֣וֹן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: O God, when thou didst go forth in the sight of thy people, when thou didst pass through the desert:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala, koskas kävit kansas edellä, koskas vaelsit korvessa, Sela,
verses.king_james: O God, when thou wentest forth before thy people, when thou didst march through the wilderness; Selah:

verses.latin_vulgate: terra mota est, etenim cæli distillaverunt,  a facie Dei Sinai, a facie Dei Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֤רֶץ רָעָ֨שָׁה ׀ אַף־שָׁמַ֣יִם נָטְפוּ֮ מִפְּנֵ֢י אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים זֶ֥ה סִינַ֑י מִפְּנֵ֥י אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The earth was moved, and the heavens dropped at the presence of the God of Sina, at the presence of the God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin maa vapisi ja taivaat tiukkuivat Jumalan edessä: tämä Sinai, Jumalan edessä, joka Israelin Jumala on.
verses.king_james: The earth shook, the heavens also dropped at the presence of God: even Sinai itself was moved at the presence of God, the God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pluviam voluntariam segregabis, Deus, hæreditati tuæ ;  et infirmata est, tu vero perfecisti eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֶּ֣שֶׁם נְ֭דָבוֹת תָּנִ֣יף אֱלֹהִ֑ים נַחֲלָתְךָ֥ וְ֝נִלְאָ֗ה אַתָּ֥ה כוֹנַנְתָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt set aside for thy inheritance a free rain, O God: and it was weakened, but thou hast made it perfect.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nyt sinä, Jumala, annat armollisen sateen, ja virvoitat perimises, joka väsynyt on.
verses.king_james: Thou, O God, didst send a plentiful rain, whereby thou didst confirm thine inheritance, when it was weary.

verses.latin_vulgate: Animalia tua habitabunt in ea ;  parasti in dulcedine tua pauperi, Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַיָּתְךָ֥ יָשְׁבוּ־בָ֑הּ תָּ֤כִֽין־בְּטוֹבָתְךָ֖ לֶֽעָנִ֣י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: In it shall thy animals dwell; in thy sweetness, O God, thou hast provided for the poor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinun laumas siinä asuis: Jumala, sinä virvoitat hyvyydelläs raadolliset.
verses.king_james: Thy congregation hath dwelt therein: thou, O God, hast prepared of thy goodness for the poor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus dabit verbum evangelizantibus, virtute multa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲדֹנָ֥י יִתֶּן־אֹ֑מֶר הַֽ֝מְבַשְּׂר֗וֹת צָבָ֥א רָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord shall give the word to them that preach good tidings with great power.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra antaa sanan suurella evankelistain joukolla.
verses.king_james: The Lord gave the word: great was the company of those that published it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex virtutum dilecti, dilecti ;  et speciei domus dividere spolia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַלְכֵ֣י צְ֭בָאוֹת יִדֹּד֣וּן יִדֹּד֑וּן וּנְוַת־בַּ֝֗יִת תְּחַלֵּ֥ק שָׁלָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The king of powers is of the beloved, of the beloved; and the beauty of the house shall divide spoils.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sotaväen kuninkaat pakenevat, he pakenevat; ja kotona asuva jakaa saaliit.
verses.king_james: Kings of armies did flee apace: and she that tarried at home divided the spoil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si dormiatis inter medios cleros,  pennæ columbæ deargentatæ,  et posteriora dorsi ejus in pallore auri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִֽם־תִּשְׁכְּבוּן֮ בֵּ֤ין שְׁפַ֫תָּ֥יִם כַּנְפֵ֣י י֭וֹנָה נֶחְפָּ֣ה בַכֶּ֑סֶף וְ֝אֶבְרוֹתֶ֗יהָ בִּירַקְרַ֥ק חָרֽוּץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: If you sleep among the midst of lots, you shall be as the wings of a dove covered with silver, and the hinder parts of her back with the paleness of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin te tarhain välissä makaatte, niin mettisen sulat ovat silatut hopialla, ja hänen siipensä ruskialla kullalla.
verses.king_james: Though ye have lien among the pots, yet shall ye be as the wings of a dove covered with silver, and her feathers with yellow gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dum discernit cælestis reges super eam,  nive dealbabuntur in Selmon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּפָ֘רֵ֤שׂ שַׁדַּ֓י מְלָ֘כִ֤ים בָּ֗הּ תַּשְׁלֵ֥ג בְּצַלְמֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: When he that is in heaven appointeth kings over her, they shall be whited with snow in Selmon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Kaikkivaltias siinä joka paikassa kuninkaat levittää, niin Zalmonissa valaisee kuin lumi.
verses.king_james: When the Almighty scattered kings in it, it was white as snow in Salmon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mons Dei, mons pinguis :  mons coagulatus, mons pinguis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַר־אֱ֭לֹהִים הַר־בָּשָׁ֑ן הַ֥ר גַּ֝בְנֻנִּ֗ים הַר־בָּשָֽׁן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The mountain of God is a fat mountain. A curdled mountain, a fat mountain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalan vuori on hedelmällinen vuori: korkia vuori on se hedelmällinen vuori.
verses.king_james: The hill of God is as the hill of Bashan; an high hill as the hill of Bashan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ut quid suspicamini, montes coagulatos ?  mons in quo beneplacitum est Deo habitare in eo ;  etenim Dominus habitabit in finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֤מָּה ׀ תְּֽרַצְּדוּן֮ הָרִ֢ים גַּבְנֻ֫נִּ֥ים הָהָ֗ר חָמַ֣ד אֱלֹהִ֣ים לְשִׁבְתּ֑וֹ אַף־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה יִשְׁכֹּ֥ן לָנֶֽצַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: Why suspect, ye curdled mountains? A mountain in which God is well pleased to dwell: for there the Lord shall dwell unto the end.
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksi te, suuret vuoret, kippaatte? Tämä on Jumalan vuori, jossa hän mielistyy asumaan; ja Herra asuu siellä ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Why leap ye, ye high hills? this is the hill which God desireth to dwell in; yea, the Lord will dwell in it for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Currus Dei decem millibus multiplex, millia lætantium ;  Dominus in eis in Sina, in sancto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֶ֤כֶב אֱלֹהִ֗ים רִבֹּתַ֣יִם אַלְפֵ֣י שִׁנְאָ֑ן אֲדֹנָ֥י בָֿ֝֗ם סִינַ֥י בַּקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The chariot of God is attended by ten thousands; thousands of them that rejoice: the Lord is among them in Sina, in the holy place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalan rattaita on monta tuhatta kertaa tuhatta: Herra on heissä, pyhässä Sinaissa.
verses.king_james: The chariots of God are twenty thousand, even thousands of angels: the Lord is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendisti in altum, cepisti captivitatem,  accepisti dona in hominibus ;  etenim non credentes inhabitare Dominum Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָ֘לִ֤יתָ לַמָּר֨וֹם ׀ שָׁ֘בִ֤יתָ שֶּׁ֗בִי לָקַ֣חְתָּ מַ֭תָּנוֹת בָּאָדָ֑ם וְאַ֥ף ס֝וֹרְרִ֗ים לִשְׁכֹּ֤ן ׀ יָ֬הּ אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive; thou hast received gifts in men. Yea for those also that do not believe, the dwelling of the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä astuit ylös korkeuteen, ja olet vangiksi ottanut vankeuden. Sinä olet lahjoja saanut ihmisille: vastahakoiset myös, että Herra Jumala siellä kumminkin asuu.
verses.king_james: Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive: thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that the Lord God might dwell among them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus die quotidie :  prosperum iter faciet nobis Deus salutarium nostrorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֤ר֣וּךְ אֲדֹנָי֮ י֤וֹם ׀ י֥֫וֹם יַעֲמׇס־לָ֗נוּ הָ֘אֵ֤ל יְֽשׁוּעָתֵ֬נוּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord day by day: the God of our salvation will make our journey prosperous to us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra joka päivä! Jumala panee kuorman meidän päällemme; mutta hän myös auttaa meitä, Sela!
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord, who daily loadeth us with benefits, even the God of our salvation. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus noster, Deus salvos faciendi ;  et Domini, Domini exitus mortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָ֤אֵ֣ל ׀ לָנוּ֮ אֵ֤ל לְֽמ֫וֹשָׁע֥וֹת וְלֵיהֹוִ֥ה אֲדֹנָ֑י לַ֝מָּ֗וֶת תֹּצָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Our God is the God of salvation: and of the Lord, of the Lord are the issues from death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meillä on Jumala, Jumala, joka auttaa, ja Herra, Herra, joka kuolemasta vapahtaa.
verses.king_james: He that is our God is the God of salvation; and unto God the Lord belong the issues from death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen Deus confringet capita inimicorum suorum,  verticem capilli perambulantium in delictis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַךְ־אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִמְחַץ֮ רֹ֤אשׁ אֹ֫יְבָ֥יו קׇדְקֹ֥ד שֵׂעָ֑ר מִ֝תְהַלֵּ֗ךְ בַּאֲשָׁמָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: But God shall break the heads of his enemies: the hairy crown of them that walk on in their sins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Jumala särkee vihollistensa pään heidän päänlakeinsa kanssa, jotka pysyvät heidän synneissänsä.
verses.king_james: But God shall wound the head of his enemies, and the hairy scalp of such an one as goeth on still in his trespasses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit Dominus : Ex Basan convertam,  convertam in profundum maris :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֣ר אֲ֭דֹנָי מִבָּשָׁ֣ן אָשִׁ֑יב אָ֝שִׁ֗יב מִֽמְּצֻל֥וֹת יָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord said: I will turn them from Basan, I will turn them into the depth of the sea:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra sanoo: minä palautan (muutamat) lihavista; meren syvyydestä minä heitä palautan,
verses.king_james: The Lord said, I will bring again from Bashan, I will bring my people again from the depths of the sea:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut intingatur pes tuus in sanguine ;  lingua canum tuorum ex inimicis, ab ipso.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֤עַן ׀ תִּ֥מְחַ֥ץ רַגְלְךָ֗ בְּ֫דָ֥ם לְשׁ֥וֹן כְּלָבֶ֑יךָ מֵאֹיְבִ֥ים מִנֵּֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thy foot may be dipped in the blood of thy enemies; the tongue of thy dogs be red with the same.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinun jalkas tulis painetuksi veressä, ja koirais kieli sinun vihollisistas.
verses.king_james: That thy foot may be dipped in the blood of thine enemies, and the tongue of thy dogs in the same.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viderunt ingressus tuos, Deus,  ingressus Dei mei, regis mei, qui est in sancto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָא֣וּ הֲלִיכוֹתֶ֣יךָ אֱלֹהִ֑ים הֲלִ֘יכ֤וֹת אֵלִ֖י מַלְכִּ֣י בַקֹּֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have seen thy goings, O God, the goings of my God: of my king who is in his sanctuary.
verses.finnish_biblia: He näkivät, Jumala, kuinkas vaellat; kuinkas, minun Jumalani ja kuninkaani, pyhässä vaellat:
verses.king_james: They have seen thy goings, O God; even the goings of my God, my King, in the sanctuary.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prævenerunt principes conjuncti psallentibus,  in medio juvencularum tympanistriarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קִדְּמ֣וּ שָׁ֭רִים אַחַ֣ר נֹגְנִ֑ים בְּת֥וֹךְ עֲ֝לָמ֗וֹת תּוֹפֵפֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Princes went before joined with singers, in the midst of young damsels playing on timbrels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Laulajat käyvät edellä, ja sitte leikarit piikain seassa, jotka kanteleita soittavat.
verses.king_james: The singers went before, the players on instruments followed after; among them were the damsels playing with timbrels.

verses.latin_vulgate: In ecclesiis benedicite Deo Domino de fontibus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּֽ֭מַקְהֵלוֹת בָּרְכ֣וּ אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֲ֝דֹנָ֗י מִמְּק֥וֹר יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the churches bless ye God the Lord, from the fountains of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät Herraa Jumalaa seurakunnissa, te Israelin lähteestä.
verses.king_james: Bless ye God in the congregations, even the Lord, from the fountain of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi Benjamin adolescentulus, in mentis excessu ;  principes Juda, duces eorum ;  principes Zabulon, principes Nephthali.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤ם בִּנְיָמִ֨ן ׀ צָעִ֡יר רֹדֵ֗ם שָׂרֵ֣י יְ֭הוּדָה רִגְמָתָ֑ם שָׂרֵ֥י זְ֝בֻל֗וּן שָׂרֵ֥י נַפְתָּלִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: There is Benjamin a youth, in ecstasy of mind. The princes of Juda are their leaders: the princes of Zabulon, the princes of Nephthali.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä hallitsee heitä vähä Benjamin, Juudan päämiehet joukkoinensa, Zebulonin päämiehet, Naphtalin päämiehet.
verses.king_james: There is little Benjamin with their ruler, the princes of Judah and their council, the princes of Zebulun, and the princes of Naphtali.

verses.latin_vulgate: Manda, Deus, virtuti tuæ ;  confirma hoc, Deus, quod operatus es in nobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צִוָּ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֗יךָ עֻ֫זֶּ֥ךָ עוּזָּ֥ה אֱלֹהִ֑ים ז֝֗וּ פָּעַ֥לְתָּ לָּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Command thy strength, O God confirm, O God, what thou hast wrought in us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun Jumalas on käskenyt sinun olla väkevän: vahvista Jumala se, minkä sinä meissä tehnyt olet.
verses.king_james: Thy God hath commanded thy strength: strengthen, O God, that which thou hast wrought for us.

verses.latin_vulgate: A templo tuo in Jerusalem,  tibi offerent reges munera.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵ֭הֵיכָלֶךָ עַל־יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם לְךָ֤ יוֹבִ֖ילוּ מְלָכִ֣ים שָֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: From thy temple in Jerusalem, kings shall offer presents to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun templis tähden, joka on Jerusalemissa, pitää kuninkaat sinulle lahjoja viemän.
verses.king_james: Because of thy temple at Jerusalem shall kings bring presents unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Increpa feras arundinis ;  congregatio taurorum in vaccis populorum :  ut excludant eos qui probati sunt argento.  Dissipa gentes quæ bella volunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גְּעַ֨ר חַיַּ֪ת קָנֶ֡ה עֲדַ֤ת אַבִּירִ֨ים ׀ בְּעֶגְלֵ֬י עַמִּ֗ים מִתְרַפֵּ֥ס בְּרַצֵּי־כָ֑סֶף בִּזַּ֥ר עַ֝מִּ֗ים קְרָב֥וֹת יֶחְפָּֽצוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Rebuke the wild beasts of the reeds, the congregation of bulls with the kine of the people; who seek to exclude them who are tried with silver. Scatter thou the nations that delight in wars:
verses.finnish_biblia: Nuhtele ruovon petoa, härkäin laumaa kansain vasikkain kanssa, jotka kumartaen tuovat hopeakankeja: hajoittanut on hän kansat, jotka mielellänsä sotivat.
verses.king_james: Rebuke the company of spearmen, the multitude of the bulls, with the calves of the people, till every one submit himself with pieces of silver: scatter thou the people that delight in war.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venient legati ex Ægypto ;  Æthiopia præveniet manus ejus Deo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶאֱתָ֣יוּ חַ֭שְׁמַנִּים מִנִּ֣י מִצְרָ֑יִם כּ֥וּשׁ תָּרִ֥יץ יָ֝דָ֗יו לֵאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ambassadors shall come out of Egypt: Ethiopia shall soon stretch out her hands to God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Egyptin päämiehet tulevat: Etiopia ojentaa käsiänsä Jumalalle.
verses.king_james: Princes shall come out of Egypt; Ethiopia shall soon stretch out her hands unto God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Regna terræ, cantate Deo ;  psallite Domino ; psallite Deo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַמְלְכ֣וֹת הָ֭אָרֶץ שִׁ֣ירוּ לֵאלֹהִ֑ים זַמְּר֖וּ אֲדֹנָ֣י סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing to God, ye kingdoms of the earth: sing ye to the Lord: Sing ye to God,
verses.finnish_biblia: Te maan valtakunnat, veisatkaat Jumalalle, veisatkaat kiitosta Herralle, Sela!
verses.king_james: Sing unto God, ye kingdoms of the earth; O sing praises unto the Lord; Selah:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ascendit super cælum cæli, ad orientem :  ecce dabit voci suæ vocem virtutis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֭רֹכֵב בִּשְׁמֵ֣י שְׁמֵי־קֶ֑דֶם הֵ֥ן יִתֵּ֥ן בְּ֝קוֹל֗וֹ ק֣וֹל עֹֽז׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who mounteth above the heaven of heavens, to the east. Behold he will give to his voice the voice of power:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sille joka asuu taivaissa joka paikassa, hamasta alusta: katso, hän antaa jylinälle voiman.
verses.king_james: To him that rideth upon the heavens of heavens, which were of old; lo, he doth send out his voice, and that a mighty voice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Date gloriam Deo super Israël ;  magnificentia ejus et virtus ejus in nubibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּנ֥וּ עֹ֗ז לֵאלֹ֫הִ֥ים עַֽל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל גַּאֲוָת֑וֹ וְ֝עֻזּ֗וֹ בַּשְּׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Give ye glory to God for Israel, his magnificence, and his power is in the clouds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Antakaat Jumalalle voima: hänen herrautensa on Israelissa, ja hänen voimansa pilvissä.
verses.king_james: Ascribe ye strength unto God: his excellency is over Israel, and his strength is in the clouds.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mirabilis Deus in sanctis suis ;  Deus Israël ipse dabit virtutem et fortitudinem plebi suæ.  Benedictus Deus !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נ֤וֹרָ֥א אֱלֹהִ֗ים מִֽמִּקְדָּ֫שֶׁ֥יךָ אֵ֤ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל ה֤וּא נֹתֵ֨ן ׀ עֹ֖ז וְתַעֲצֻמ֥וֹת לָעָ֗ם בָּר֥וּךְ אֱלֹהִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: God is wonderful in his saints: the God of Israel is he who will give power and strength to his people. Blessed be God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala on ihmeellinen pyhässänsä, hän on Israelin Jumala: hän antaa kansalle väen ja voiman: kiitetty olkoon Jumala!
verses.king_james: O God, thou art terrible out of thy holy places: the God of Israel is he that giveth strength and power unto his people. Blessed be God.
